posts.author: Bullan (Andrew Bull)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

At the moment group labels are just that, labels and don’t integrate/connect to the items within them. It would be good to be able to have them dynamic so that you can auto-group in a similar way that Airtable operates. Allowing you to group by a any column type (and the individual selections within these columns) would make life a lot easier and speed up workflow and generally just a lot more intuitive.

Cheers
